audit_result.proof_trace: RPC/sync data columns from untrusted P2P peers bypass full validation. Gossip path enforces signature verification, proposer checks, and inclusion proofs (L479-508), but RPC custody columns receive only KZG validation (L446), skipping all cryptographic authenticity checks.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker responds to DataColumnsByRange with columns having valid KZG proofs but forged signatures or invalid merkle proofs. Columns pass KZG check (L446), get marked available (L467-475), and could be reconstructed or propagated without detecting the forgery.

PROP-6a4369e9-asm-001.text: P2P peers are untrusted; all P2P input must be fully validated before acceptance.
PROP-6a4369e9-asm-001.assertion: forall msg from P2P: processed(msg) => fully_validated(msg) == true
